references.description: Official MCP servers examples - relevant for thoughts_tool MCP implementation patterns
Main Claude Code repository - essential for understanding Task tool implementation and agent system internals
Community collection of Claude Code subagent examples and patterns
Lightweight Zig implementation of Model Context Protocol (MCP) with compile-time validated interfaces, type-safe tool definitions, and automatic schema generation for LLM-to-tool integration

Zig programming language compiler, standard library, and toolchain - a systems programming language emphasizing robustness, optimal performance, and C/C++ interoperability with cross-compilation support
Pure Rust git implementation - evaluating as potential replacement for git2/libgit2 to solve SSH agent compatibility issues
Linear official monorepo containing GraphQL schema, TypeScript SDK, and codegen tools - essential for understanding the Linear API structure for Rust implementation
Makepad - MIT-licensed Rust UI framework with Android/Linux support, GPU-accelerated rendering
Moly - AI LLM client built with Makepad in pure Rust
Robrix - Matrix chat client built with Makepad, has working Android APK releases
Slint UI framework - declarative Rust GUI with Android/Linux support (triple-licensed)
Iced - MIT-licensed Elm-architecture Rust GUI framework
ChatGPT client built with Slint - example of streaming LLM UI in Rust
Mozilla UniFFI - generates Kotlin/Swift bindings from Rust (MPL-2.0)
AI toolkit library used by Moly - contains streaming implementation, ChatController, BotClient abstractions for LLM clients
Limbo - Turso's SQLite-compatible database written in Rust, evaluating for chat persistence in Claude client
Turso database - the branded/production version of Limbo, checking for Rust bindings and crate naming
Testing add_reference tool from PR
Just MCP server with three-tier parsing strategy (tree-sitter → CLI → regex) - reference for justfile-to-MCP tool generation
Production-ready Just MCP server using CLI wrapper approach - reference for justfile introspection and recipe execution
OpenRouter API integration examples including prompt caching, streaming, and tool calling patterns
OpenRouter provider for Vercel AI SDK with comprehensive Anthropic support and beta headers handling
OpenRouter tool calling demo showing function calling capabilities
Official OpenRouter TypeScript SDK - shows API patterns and model support
napi-rs - Rust bindings for Node-API, works with Bun (95% Node-API support). Key for the recommended napi-rs in-process architecture.
yerpc - JSON-RPC library with automatic TypeScript client generation. Alternative to napi-rs for type-safe Rust-to-TS communication.
ts-rs - Generate TypeScript type definitions from Rust structs. Useful for HTTP server approach with shared types.
OpenTUI - The underlying TUI framework used by opencode. TextareaRenderable and ref callback timing may be relevant to the input.setText race condition bug.
Schemars 1.x reference for JsonSchema API migration
Discord MCP server with 128 operations for full server administration - the chosen Discord MCP for community setup
Self-hosted Jina Reader alternative - Docker-based HTML-to-Markdown converter with headless Chrome, leading candidate for web fetch tool
MIT-licensed async Python crawler with Markdown/JSON output, JS rendering via Playwright - strong alternative for web fetch/crawl
User's own prior HTML-to-Markdown service built ~2 years ago with Cloudflare Workers (TinyGo), D1 caching - prior art for web fetch tooling
Exa's official MCP server implementation - reference for building custom web search tool
Cargo's file locking implementation - reference for DIY FileLock replacement
PGlite - Postgres compiled to WASM, developed by ElectricSQL - key candidate for embedded Postgres in client/edge
pglite-oxide - Rust bindings for PGlite via wasmtime, version 0.1.0 - for running Postgres 17.x in WASM from Rust
ElectricSQL - Postgres sync engine that just hit 1.0 GA, syncs subsets of Postgres to clients via HTTP
libSQL - Production-ready SQLite fork with sync, vectors, encryption - the underlying tech for Turso
AgentFS filesystem for agents (Turso) for DB-backed filesystem patterns.
Durable Streams monorepo with official Rust client (packages/client-rust) - investigating for Postgres sync to local stores
HTTP mocking library with built-in recording/playback support for conformance testing
GEPA AI repository for comparison with our GPT-5 reasoner optimization strategies
DSPy framework for programming with foundation models - for comparison with our GPT-5 reasoner optimization
Reference for Neovim/TOML configuration patterns relevant to configuration system rewrite
Rust tempfile crate - de facto standard for atomic file writes via NamedTempFile::persist(), recommended replacement for atomicwrites
Official OpenAI cookbook with GPT-5, Codex, and prompting guide notebooks relevant to OpenAI-optimized command design
Official OpenAI multi-agent SDK with instructions patterns, handoffs, and agent/tool orchestration behavior
Canonical trigram-index regex search implementation from Russ Cox; reference for regex-to-trigram query planning and mmap-friendly on-disk indexing.
Rust trigram-based code search engine with local indexing and incremental updates; strong fit for instant grep replacement ideas.
Production trigram-based code search engine; useful reference for large-scale index layout, candidate filtering, and regex verification.
Suffix-array-based regex code search system discussed in the instant grep article; highest-value missing architectural alternative to trigram/sparse-ngram indexing.
Pinned upstream OpenCode reference for timeout behavior comparison against local orchestrator expectations.
Retry pinned upstream OpenCode v1.3.0 reference for timeout behavior comparison.
Latest upstream OpenCode dev branch for spotting post-release behavioral changes.
Upstream cargo-deny changelog and docs for defensible version selection.
mergerfs source code - investigating FUSE mounting changes between 2.40.2 and 2.41.x for Ubuntu 26.04 AppArmor compatibility
OpenCode v1.3.13 server implementation to compare against SDK
OpenCode v1.3.17 for SDK compatibility analysis
Vercel AI SDK - checking strict mode handling for OpenAI vs OpenRouter providers
